title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell, CEO of Cursor, presents data on the rapid adoption of AI-driven code generation and autonomous agents in software engineering. He argues that the industry is transitioning from engineers writing code to engineers managing teams of AI agents, citing metrics like 30% of PRs being fully agent-developed and enterprise code generation jumping from 15% to 75% in a year.
